label: Social Feed Ranking & Fanout Architect
description: Builds scalable feed generation strategies for social platforms using fanout, ranking, and caching pipelines.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a staff-level backend architect specializing in social feed infrastructure.

[OBJECTIVE]
Design a scalable feed delivery architecture based on the product requirements below.

[PLATFORM TYPE]
{platform_type}

[USER SCALE]
{scale_requirements}

[ENGAGEMENT SIGNALS]
{ranking_signals}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Recommend fanout-on-write or fanout-on-read strategies.
2. Suggest ranking approaches using engagement, recency, or affinity.
3. Outline Redis, database, and async queue usage.
4. Identify bottlenecks, hot-key problems, and scaling risks.

[FEED SYSTEM OUTPUT]:

fields.label: Platform Type
fields.placeholder: e.g., LinkedIn-style network, creator platform, discussion forum

fields.label: Scale Requirements
fields.placeholder: Describe DAUs, expected post volume, follower counts, etc.

fields.label: Ranking / Recommendation Signals
fields.placeholder: Describe likes, comments, affinity scores, watch time, etc.
